title: How to Identify Skills Required for Any Job
description: Learn how professionals identify required skills. Discover your skill gaps, prioritize learning, and build a learning roadmap for the next 3-6 months.
target_audience: College graduates planning their learning journey
questions_it_answers: What skills do I need for my chosen career?
Which skills should I learn first?
How do I identify my skill gaps?
What's the best way to learn career skills?
